training.loss: MSE on ridge residuals standardized by train-normal residual standard deviation

notes: Ridge-only baselines are fitted using train_normal and alpha-selected on val_normal.
Residual targets are y_scaled minus ridge_pred_scaled, then divided by train-normal residual standard deviation.
residual_process_tcn is the matched process residual baseline without Raman information.
residual_naive_raman_tcn uses process residual features and Raman PCA by direct concatenation.
residual_target_gate_tcn learns a per-target Raman gate; no manual target or Raman weights are used.
Raman spectra are used only at the source time; future controls are explicitly provided as known exogenous conditions.
test_fault is used only for final evaluation and never for baseline alpha, residual scale, or checkpoint selection.
